name: freecad_parametric
tests_note: pytest 5/5 local (trimesh path) + E2E Hetzner -> bridge -> FreeCAD: vehicle box V=12.96 mm3, 6 faces watertight, real ISO-10303-21 STEP downloadable @ ~560ms
notes: Agent 21 v0.2.0 routes parametric work to the NOVA Host Bridge over the existing Tailscale mesh (PC alex-main-1). Real FreeCAD 1.0.2 produces FCStd + STEP + STL; agent returns downloadable bridge URLs. If the bridge is unreachable the agent transparently falls back to trimesh primitives (no STEP). Variants_generate runs jury per variant using bridge metrics when bridge is up.
